title: Android-targeted Godot repo still lacks export surfaces or debug APK proof while the repo claims release progress or completion
description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-005 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Keep Godot Android repos blocked on explicit export surfaces plus debug APK proof. Once release work starts or the repo claims completion, require `export_presets.cfg`, non-placeholder `android/` support surfaces, and a debug APK at the canonical build path.
summary: Keep Godot Android repos blocked on explicit export surfaces plus debug APK proof. Once release work starts or the repo claims completion, require `export_presets.cfg`, non-placeholder `android/` support surfaces, and a debug APK at the canonical build path.

title: Source imports reference missing local modules
description: Remediate REF-003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Audit local relative import paths and fail when the referenced module file is missing.
summary: Audit local relative import paths and fail when the referenced module file is missing.

title: The supplied session transcript shows the operator trapped between contradictory workflow rules instead of having one clear legal next move
description: Remediate SESSION006 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Design every workflow state so it exposes one legal next action, one named owner, and one blocker return path. When transcript evidence shows a trap, audit adjacent surfaces together instead of treating each symptom as isolated noise.
summary: Design every workflow state so it exposes one legal next action, one named owner, and one blocker return path. When transcript evidence shows a trap, audit adjacent surfaces together instead of treating each symptom as isolated noise.

title: The supplied session transcript shows a ticket whose literal acceptance command reaches into later-ticket scope, so the ticket cannot close without violating its own scope boundary
description: Remediate WFLOW023 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Keep ticket acceptance scope-isolated. If the literal closeout command depends on later-ticket work, split the tickets differently or encode the dependency in the ticket structure instead of shipping a contradictory acceptance command.
summary: Keep ticket acceptance scope-isolated. If the literal closeout command depends on later-ticket work, split the tickets differently or encode the dependency in the ticket structure instead of shipping a contradictory acceptance command.
